hard_logic_py:
result_list=[]
inner_city_transportation_set=set()
for activity in allactivities(plan):
  if activity_type(activity)=='transportation': inner_city_transportation_set.add(activity_position(activity))
result=not({"walk"}&inner_city_transportation_set)
result_list.append(result)
result=False
intercity_transport_go=''
intercity_transport_back=''
if allactivities(plan)[0]['type'] != "train" and intercity_transport_origin(allactivities(plan)[0])==start_city(plan) and allactivities(plan)[-1]['type'] != "train" and intercity_transport_origin(allactivities(plan)[-1])==target_city(plan):
  result=True
result_list.append(result)
result=False
for r in result_list:
  result=result or r
nature_language:
One person traveling from Shenzhen to Beijing for 3 days, meeting any one of the following:  
1. Do not want to travel by walking within the city.  
2. Do not want to take a train to the destination or take a train back.
